'''moyajaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:xiphiiform|xiphiiform]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-y-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:xiphiiform|xiphiiform]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| moyajaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:moyajithi|moyajithi]] || [[word:moyajiji|moyajiji]] || [[word:moyajishi|moyajishi]] || [[word:moyajiki|moyajiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:moyajuthuthu|moyajuthuthu]] || [[word:moyajujuju|moyajujuju]] || [[word:moyajushushu|moyajushushu]] || [[word:moyajukuku|moyajukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:moyajuthu|moyajuthu]] || [[word:moyajuju|moyajuju]] || [[word:moyajushu|moyajushu]] || [[word:moyajuku|moyajuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:moyajufthuf|moyajufthuf]] || [[word:moyajufjuf|moyajufjuf]] || [[word:moyajufshuf|moyajufshuf]] || [[word:moyajufkuf|moyajufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:moyajethe|moyajethe]] || [[word:moyajeje|moyajeje]] || [[word:moyajeshe|moyajeshe]] || [[word:moyajeke|moyajeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:moyajothotho|moyajothotho]] || [[word:moyajojojo|moyajojojo]] || [[word:moyajoshosho|moyajoshosho]] || [[word:moyajokoko|moyajokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:moyajotho|moyajotho]] || [[word:moyajojo|moyajojo]] || [[word:moyajosho|moyajosho]] || [[word:moyajoko|moyajoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:moyajofthof|moyajofthof]] || [[word:moyajofjof|moyajofjof]] || [[word:moyajofshof|moyajofshof]] || [[word:moyajofkof|moyajofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:moyajÃŸfthÃŸf|moyajÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:moyajÃŸfjÃŸf|moyajÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:moyajÃŸfshÃŸf|moyajÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:moyajÃŸfkÃŸf|moyajÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:moyajÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|moyajÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:moyajÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|moyajÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:moyajÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|moyajÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:moyajÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|moyajÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:moyajÃŸfthÃŸf|moyajÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:moyajÃŸfjÃŸf|moyajÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:moyajÃŸfshÃŸf|moyajÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:moyajÃŸfkÃŸf|moyajÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:moyajÃŸfthÃŸf|moyajÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:moyajÃŸfjÃŸf|moyajÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:moyajÃŸfshÃŸf|moyajÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:moyajÃŸfkÃŸf|moyajÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:moyajÃḊthÃḊ|moyajÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:moyajÃḊjÃḊ|moyajÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:moyajÃḊshÃḊ|moyajÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:moyajÃḊkÃḊ|moyajÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:moyajathatha|moyajathatha]] || [[word:moyajajaja|moyajajaja]] || [[word:moyajashasha|moyajashasha]] || [[word:moyajakaka|moyajakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:moyajatha|moyajatha]] || [[word:moyajaja|moyajaja]] || [[word:moyajasha|moyajasha]] || [[word:moyajaka|moyajaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:moyajafthaf|moyajafthaf]] || [[word:moyajafjaf|moyajafjaf]] || [[word:moyajafshaf|moyajafshaf]] || [[word:moyajafkaf|moyajafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:moyajasha|moyajasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:moyajshÃḋsha|moyajshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:moyajrosha|moyajrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:moyajmusha|moyajmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:moyajyasha|moyajyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomoyajnkshÃḋsha|gomoyajnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomoyajnkrosha|gomoyajnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomoyajnkmusha|gomoyajnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomoyajnkyasha|gomoyajnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:moyayajasha|moyayajasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:moyayajshÃḋsha|moyayajshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:moyayajrosha|moyayajrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:moyayajmusha|moyayajmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:moyayajyasha|moyayajyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomoyayajnkshÃḋsha|gomoyayajnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomoyayajnkrosha|gomoyayajnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomoyayajnkmusha|gomoyayajnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomoyayajnkyasha|gomoyayajnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:meyÃḊjasha|meyÃḊjasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:meyÃḊjshÃḋsha|meyÃḊjshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:meyÃḊjrosha|meyÃḊjrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:meyÃḊjmusha|meyÃḊjmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:meyÃḊjyasha|meyÃḊjyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomeyÃḊjnkshÃḋsha|gomeyÃḊjnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomeyÃḊjnkrosha|gomeyÃḊjnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomeyÃḊjnkmusha|gomeyÃḊjnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomeyÃḊjnkyasha|gomeyÃḊjnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:moyfajasha|moyfajasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:moyfajshÃḋsha|moyfajshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:moyfajrosha|moyfajrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:moyfajmusha|moyfajmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:moyfajyasha|moyfajyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomoyfajnkshÃḋsha|gomoyfajnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomoyfajnkrosha|gomoyfajnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomoyfajnkmusha|gomoyfajnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomoyfajnkyasha|gomoyfajnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4f6272c}}
